title: jwt-go: access restriction bypass vulnerability
fix_explanation: Migrate to github.com/golang-jwt/jwt v5.2.0 as jwt-go is unmaintained and this version addresses the vulnerability through active maintenance and potential re-architecting.

title: golang-jwt/jwt: jwt-go allows excessive memory allocation during header parsing
fix_explanation: Upgrade to github.com/golang-jwt/jwt v5.2.0 to mitigate potential excessive memory allocation during header parsing.

title: golang.org/x/crypto/ssh: Misuse of ServerConfig.PublicKeyCallback may cause authorization bypass in golang.org/x/crypto
fix_explanation: Updating to v0.35.0 fixes an authorization bypass vulnerability in SSH public key callback misuse.

title: golang.org/x/crypto/ssh: Denial of Service in the Key Exchange of golang.org/x/crypto/ssh
fix_explanation: Updating to v0.35.0 resolves a Denial of Service vulnerability during the SSH key exchange process.

title: @remix-run/router: react-router: React Router vulnerable to XSS via Open Redirects
fix_explanation: Upgrading to version 1.23.2 mitigates an XSS vulnerability via open redirects in React Router.

title: axios: Possible SSRF and Credential Leakage via Absolute URL in axios Requests
fix_explanation: Updating Axios to version 1.13.5 resolves a Server-Side Request Forgery and credential leakage vulnerability.

title: axios: Axios DoS via lack of data size check
fix_explanation: Upgrading Axios to version 1.13.5 prevents a Denial of Service vulnerability due to a lack of data size checks.

title: axios: Axios affected by Denial of Service via __proto__ Key in mergeConfig
fix_explanation: Updating Axios to version 1.13.5 addresses a Denial of Service vulnerability via __proto__ key in mergeConfig.

title: cross-spawn: regular expression denial of service
fix_explanation: Upgrading to cross-spawn version 7.0.5 fixes a regular expression denial of service vulnerability.

title: form-data: Unsafe random function in form-data
fix_explanation: Updating form-data to version 4.0.4 addresses a critical vulnerability caused by an unsafe random function.

title: glob: glob: Command Injection Vulnerability via Malicious Filenames
fix_explanation: Upgrading glob to version 10.5.0 remediates a command injection vulnerability via malicious filenames.

title: minimatch: minimatch: Denial of Service via specially crafted glob patterns
fix_explanation: Upgrading minimatch to version 10.2.3 prevents a Denial of Service vulnerability via specially crafted glob patterns.

title: minimatch: minimatch: Denial of Service due to unbounded recursive backtracking via crafted glob patterns
fix_explanation: Updating minimatch to version 10.2.3 resolves a Denial of Service vulnerability due to unbounded recursive backtracking.

title: minimatch: Minimatch: Denial of Service via catastrophic backtracking in glob expressions
fix_explanation: Upgrading minimatch to version 10.2.3 fixes a Denial of Service vulnerability caused by catastrophic backtracking in glob expressions.

title: rollup: Rollup: Remote Code Execution via Path Traversal Vulnerability
fix_explanation: Updating Rollup to version 4.59.0 prevents a Remote Code Execution vulnerability via path traversal.
